case_title: PRZYBYLA, SCOTT vs. KEVIN ROBERTSON, IND. & DBA KEVCO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRZYBYLA, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEVIN ROBERTSON, IND. & DBA KEVCO $1,428.93 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,508.93
